extra.reason: Completed initial haxified Rust contract docs, linked profile docs, non-goals, capability map, and tracker sweep.

Added docs/metal-capability-fixtures.md with contract-first positive/negative fixture matrix, existing evidence, missing first-wave fixtures, harness owners, failure policy, and Beads mapping; linked it from the roadmap and docs index.

Added docs/metal-type-surface-gap-matrix.md with supported/partial/missing audit for rust.*, reflaxe.std, and hxrt/native type surfaces; linked it from the roadmap, docs index, and fixture plan; mapped priority gaps and follow-up Beads.

Implemented SurfaceContractRegistry and contract_report schema v5 with consumedSurfaces/nativeRepresentationPlan; guard now verifies deterministic Option/Result facade report entries. Residual Oracle follow-ups remain in sibling beads.
